item.title: Sum of low squares 摘要
item.description:
For an odd prime p, half the numbers from 1 to p-1 are quadratic residues (squares). If p ≡ 3 mod 4, define the signature as the sum of low squares (residues less than p/2) modulo p. Surprisingly, the signature uniquely determines p: given signature s, p is the largest prime factor of 16s+1, or equivalently p = (16s+1)/m where m is the smallest in {3,7,11,15} that yields a prime. This result, from a 1998 Mathematics Magazine article, can be used as a parlor trick to recover the prime from its signature.
标签: quadratic residues, number theory, prime numbers, signature, modular arithmetic, mathematics, parlor trick, low squares, inverse signature

item.title: 9to5Mac Uncovers Dozens of Disguised Gambling Apps on the App Store in Brazil 摘要
item.description:
9to5Mac reports that Brazilian App Store users are finding poorly made games with AI-generated animal icons ranking high in categories like Navigation, Travel, and Weather. These are 'jacket apps' that hide gambling platforms, only revealing them when accessed from a Brazilian IP address. Over 60 such apps were found. The article argues that while App Store review cannot catch all disguised scams, Apple should focus on preventing the most popular scams from succeeding, citing 'PotatoPlot Puzzle'—a game that became the top weather app in Brazil—as an inexcusable failure.
标签: App Store, scam, gambling, Brazil, AI-generated, jacket apps, Apple, review, fraud, mobile

item.title: Fitting a regular expression to a list of words 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses techniques for creating efficient regular expressions from a list of words. It contrasts grep's -f flag for word lists with ripgrep's single-regex approach, which can fail on large lists due to size limits. The Python package trieregex uses a trie structure to compress common prefixes, producing shorter regexes than brute-force alternation. However, it does not optimize for common suffixes. The author applies this to HCPCS medical codes, achieving a 5:2 compression ratio and demonstrating ripgrep's 1000x speedup over grep for searching these codes.
标签: regex, grep, ripgrep, trieregex, optimization, Python, HCPCS, ICD-10, text processing, performance

item.title: Paper 摘要
item.description:
Paper is a professional design tool where every layer is real HTML and CSS, bridging design and code. It supports bidirectional workflows: code to design and design to code. AI agents can connect via MCP to read and edit designs, and Paper Snapshot captures live sites as editable layers. This reduces handoffs and abstraction layers, allowing designers to focus on craft and decisions.
标签: design, code, HTML, CSS, AI, MCP, tool, productivity, web, development
